pattern: A whole string is a subsequence of the other only when the two are identical, so the longest uncommon subsequence is the longer string unless both strings match.
hints: If the two strings are equal, every subsequence of one is also a subsequence of the other.
If they differ, the longer string itself cannot be a subsequence of the shorter or different one.
Return -1 when the strings are equal, otherwise the length of the longer string.

edge_inputs.description: identical strings have no uncommon subsequence
single identical characters return minus one
max length strings that are equal
max length strings differing in one spot

stress.description: random short strings often equal to exercise both branches
